source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A piston/cylinder arrangement has a linear spring and the outside atmosphere acting on the piston. It contains water at 3 MPa and 400\circ\text{C} with a volume of 0.1 m^3. If the piston is at the bottom, the spring exerts a force such that a pressure of 200 kPa inside is required to balance the forces. The system now cools until the pressure reaches 1 MPa. Find the heat transfer of the process.

If the piston is at the bottom, the spring exerts a force such that a pressure of 200 kPa inside is required to balance the forces. The system now cools until the pressure reaches 1 MPa. Find the heat transfer of the process.
